spot.hero.label: Security Platform for Operational Technology
spot.hero.headline:
Your OT fleet is a compliance gap.
SPOT closes it.
spot.hero.sub: SPOT automates device lifecycle management for OT environments in critical infrastructure. Certificate rotation, network configuration, fleet inventory, compliance proof. All on-premise, all from a single interface.
spot.problem.label: The problem
spot.problem.heading: OT devices are the blind spot in critical infrastructure security
spot.problem.p1: Critical infrastructure operators run thousands of OT devices: IP cameras, badge readers, access control systems, intercoms. These devices come from multiple vendors, span multiple generations, and are rarely included in cybersecurity audits.
spot.problem.p2: Teams manage them manually with spreadsheets and vendor-specific tools. Firmware versions are unknown. Certificate lifecycles are tracked in email threads. Configuration drift goes unnoticed until an audit flags it.
spot.problem.p3: Meanwhile, security frameworks and compliance requirements are tightening. Regulators are no longer accepting "we'll get to it."
spot.problem.callout: Real example: To update 802.1x certificates on 600 IP cameras, it took a dedicated team working several weeks. One brand at a time, one device at a time. This is not an edge case. This is the norm.
spot.features.label: What SPOT does
spot.features.heading: Automate the work nobody should be doing manually
spot.features.sub: SPOT handles the most painful, time-consuming OT operations tasks across your entire fleet, regardless of brand or generation.
spot.features.card1.title: 802.1x certificate lifecycle
spot.features.card1.text: Automated CSR generation, signing, and upload across your entire device fleet. What took weeks now takes minutes. No manual device-by-device work.
spot.features.card2.title: Network configuration management
spot.features.card2.text: Push NTP, DNS, and other network settings to hundreds of devices at once. One interface, every brand. No more configuration drift between audits.
spot.features.card3.title: Visual device inventory
spot.features.card3.text: Upload facility floor plans and place devices on the map. See what's deployed where, with firmware versions, certificate status, and configuration state at a glance.
spot.features.card4.title: Multi-brand, single pane
spot.features.card4.text: Axis, Bosch, and more coming. Manage your heterogeneous fleet from one interface instead of juggling vendor-specific tools and portals.
spot.features.card5.title: Compliance reporting
spot.features.card5.text: Generate audit-ready reports that prove your OT fleet is configured, patched, and compliant. Exportable evidence for every device, every action, every change.
spot.features.quote:
"Other tools tell you what's wrong.
SPOT fixes it and proves it to your auditor."
spot.screenshot.label: SPOT in action
spot.screenshot.heading: Built for operators, not analysts
spot.screenshot.sub: A clean interface designed for the teams who actually manage OT devices day to day.
spot.deployment.label: Deployment
spot.deployment.heading: On-premise. Air-gap compatible. No data leaves your perimeter.
spot.deployment.sub: SPOT is deployed entirely within your infrastructure. There is no cloud dependency, no telemetry, no external data flow. Built for environments where data sovereignty is not optional.
spot.deployment.item1.title: Fully on-premise
spot.deployment.item1.text: Frontend, API, queue, workers. Everything runs inside your network. No cloud, no SaaS dependency.
spot.deployment.item2.title: Air-gap ready
spot.deployment.item2.text: Designed for the most restricted environments. No internet required. Deploy in classified or isolated networks.
spot.deployment.item3.title: Days, not months
spot.deployment.item3.text: Lightweight deployment. No agents on devices, no network taps, no months-long integrations. Connect and start managing.
spot.cta.label: Get started
spot.cta.heading: Let's talk about your OT fleet
spot.cta.text: No pitch deck, no demo theater. A direct conversation about what you're dealing with and whether SPOT is the right fit.
